title: Welcome to Your Locker
bodyHtml:
Your locker is your personal workspace on High School How To. Open it once and you're set — no setup needed.

What's in your locker

You've got four apps:

  • 📋 To-do — make lists, check things off, set due dates
  • 📝 Notes — quick notes, study summaries, ideas
  • ⏱ Timer — basic countdown or Pomodoro mode
  • 📌 Pins — pinned web links to sites you use a lot

How it works

On a computer? Your active apps live side-by-side in panes. A small toolbar at the top lets you toggle apps on and off, change your locker color, and pick a font.

On your phone? Swipe left and right to move between apps. All four apps are always there — the dots at the bottom show which one you're on.

Take a look around and start using it.
description: An overview of your locker and everything in it.
